title: The Box Truck Film: Building a Reuseful Home!
original_title: The Box Truck Film: Building A Reuseful Home
overview: Two builders convert a moving truck into a 98-square foot tiny house and mobile reuse education center; using reused, repurposed, and dumpster-dived materials. Their triumph over junk showcases the endless benefits of the reuse lifestyle.
